e1EvaluatedConceptSet.note: Amendment A1 (docs/poc-design.md Phase M): {kind, lost} are excluded from E1's evaluated/reported concept universe (no defensible deterministic sense winner). Their concept tokens REMAIN in the vocab and their rows remain frozen/controlled in all arms; the mapper still abstains on their surfaces, so they can never be attested or substituted.

format.train: uint16 LE stream; sequences <gloss> EMIT <concept> <eos> (emission) and <carrier with concept token> <eos> (exposure); order = det_permutation('e4/order/<seed>')
format.eval: eval.jsonl items end at EMIT; score next-token logits restricted to candidateIds (e4-vocab.json)

assertions: tier-2 absent from all train streams; no held-out token after EMIT; verified on the emitted uint16 streams (fail closed)
